allow: Bash(python -m py_compile engine.py lexicon.py app.py bootstrap_ipa.py)

Bash(python -c "import lexicon; L=lexicon.Lexicon.load_default\(\); print\('langs',L.languages\(\)\); print\('ig ndewo ->', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','Ndewo'\)\); print\('ig phrase ->', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','Ọ dị mma'\)\); print\('ig unknown ->', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','xyzzy foobar'\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "import lexicon; L=lexicon.Lexicon.load_default\(\); print\('ndewo:', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','Ndewo'\)\); print\('phrase Ọ dị mma:', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','Ọ dị mma'\)\); print\('per-word stitch \(biko ndewo\):', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','Biko Ndewo'\)\); print\('unknown:', L.ipa_for_text\('ig','xyzzy foobar'\)\); import engine; print\('espeak bin:', engine.espeak_bin\(\)\); r=engine.Engine\(L\).synthesize\('Ndewo','ig'\); print\('synth ig ->', {k:\('<audio>' if k=='audioBase64' and v else v\) for k,v in r.to_dict\(\).items\(\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const D=require\('libsql'\); const d=new D\(':memory:'\); d.exec\('create table t\(x\)'\); d.prepare\('insert into t values\(?\)'\).run\(1\); console.log\('libsql better-sqlite3 API OK, rows:', d.prepare\('select count\(*\) c from t'\).get\(\).c\); if\(typeof d.pragma==='function'\){d.pragma\('journal_mode=WAL'\);console.log\('pragma OK'\)}")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const k='node_modules/@libsql/linux-x64-gnu'; const p=l.packages[k]; console.log\(k, p?\('os='+p.os+' cpu='+p.cpu+' optional='+p.optional\):'MISSING'\)")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const k='node_modules/@libsql/linux-x64-gnu'; const p=l.packages[k]; console.log\(p?\('os='+p.os+' cpu='+p.cpu+' optional='+p.optional\):'MISSING'\)")
